TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kalan_dalah, title = Kalan_dalah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalan_dalah} }

S.FORM: Kalan dalah Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Kalan dalah a niyaro', 173 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 611 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 560 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 51 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 83%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾan ɬ~ɮaɾaħ itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u kaɾan ɬ~ɮaɾaħ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kalan dalah Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko Kalan dalah a niyaro', 173 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 611 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 560 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 51 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 83%, Amis 2%, Truku 1%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾan ɬ~ɮaɾaħ itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u kaɾan ɬ~ɮaɾaħ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
